title: WIP: Shared depth training
author: tranphat180603
quantization: mixed int6/int5 with fp16 keep patterns

data.description: Shares only the MLP weights across logical layers while keeping attention and control parameters unique per logical layer.

data.method: mixed int6/int5 with fp16 keep patterns
data.scope: shared MLP pools int6, ordinary MLP weights int5, selected tensors fp16

data.description: Uses shared-depth training with repeated MLP id patterns across encoder and decoder blocks to reduce parameter count without changing the 10 logical-layer topology.

novel_contributions: Shared only the MLP weights across logical layers while keeping attention/control parameters unique.
Kept the original 10 logical-layer topology with 5 encoder and 5 decoder layers.
Used 6 unique MLP pools total via repeated encoder/decoder MLP id patterns.
Exported shared MLP pools as int6 while keeping ordinary MLP weights on the int5 path.
Spent saved bytes on gentler serialization rather than increasing model capacity.
